title: Osimaly's hats
description: Want hats but don't want mods? Well here's  Osimaly's hats.
body:
Hey where do i get this hat you ask. Well you type in these commands (more will come soon)

/give @s minecraft:carved_pumpkin{CustomModelData:1} (frog hat)

/give @s minecraft:carved_pumpkin{CustomModelData:2}(cat hat)

/give @s minecraft:carved_pumpkin{CustomModelData:3}(create hat)

/give @s minecraft:carved_pumpkin{CustomModelData:4}(thing hat)

I will make a list of the hats and there number next to them

 

this works on 1.19.4/1.19.2

NOTE:

this is a very very new texture pack. And more is on its way.

and the textures look to be 16x16 but aren't somehow

**THIS IS HAS BEEN ABANDONED**

(I might make a remaster of this soon)
